description: Legal document recording that Sitt al-Husn, daughter of Saadya, sought a gold tiara ('isaba) that she had pawned to the recently-deceased physician Abu al-Murajja b. Daniel against a loan of 24 dinars, from his heirs. A witness testifies that the deceased had forgiven the loan. Dated 27 Tammuz 1440/ July 1129. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, 487). Written and signed by Halfon b. Menashshe Halevi.
description_he: מסמך משפטי: סת אל-חסן מבקשת קשת זהב שהועבדה לרופא שנפטר. מתוארך יולי 1129.
